subject: Cycle 2 check — still here, standing by for your go-ahead
message:
Bull — Cycle 2 check at 06:34Z. Network stable, ready to roll on whichever down app you want me to tackle first. Just say the word and I'll start diagnosing. I've got Tailscale up, GitLab syncing, all green.

Also — quick question: do you have the OPENROUTER_API_KEY configured for FloodClaims vision testing, or should I verify Railway has it set?

— OWL
